requirement_topic.en: ISED Certification Number Marking — IC number and RSS-Gen labelling
requirement_topic.zh: ISED认证编号标识 — IC编号和RSS-Gen标签
requirement_topic.zht: ISED認證編號標示 — IC編號和RSS-Gen標籤

summary.en: Certified radio apparatus must carry the required ISED certification identification, often still called the IC number in industry practice. RSS-Gen sets general labelling and user information requirements, including how the certification number is displayed on the product, electronically, or in documentation when permitted.
summary.zh: 已认证的无线电设备必须带有规定的ISED认证标识，行业实践中通常仍称为IC编号。RSS-Gen规定了一般标签和用户信息要求，包括在产品、允许的电子标签或文件中显示认证编号的方式。
summary.zht: 已認證的無線電設備必須帶有規定的ISED認證標示，行業實務中通常仍稱為IC編號。RSS-Gen規定了一般標籤和使用者資訊要求，包括在產品、允許的電子標籤或文件中顯示認證編號的方式。

standards_or_laws: ISED RSS-Gen — General Requirements for Compliance of Radio Apparatus
ISED equipment certification and registration requirements

summary.en: China SRRC-approved radio transmitting equipment is marked with Chinese type approval information and commonly carries CCC markings where CCC applies. These Chinese marks and certificate numbers are not formatted as ISED certification numbers and are not searchable Canadian equipment approvals.
summary.zh: 在中国，取得SRRC核准的无线电发射设备会标示中国型号核准信息，适用CCC时通常还会标示CCC标志。这些中国标志和证书编号并非ISED认证编号格式，也不是可查询的加拿大设备批准。
summary.zht: 在中國，取得SRRC核准的無線電發射設備會標示中國型號核准資訊，適用CCC時通常還會標示CCC標誌。這些中國標誌和證書編號並非ISED認證編號格式，也不是可查詢的加拿大設備批准。

standards_or_laws: China SRRC model approval marking requirements
China CCC mark requirements where applicable

gap.en: A product label designed for China normally lacks the Canadian certification number and required Canadian radio notices. Importers must confirm the final label, packaging, electronic label, and manual align with the certified ISED listing and use the correct certification number for the exact module or host configuration.
gap.zh: 面向中国设计的产品标签通常缺少加拿大认证编号及必要的加拿大无线电声明。进口商必须确认最终标签、包装、电子标签和说明书与已认证的ISED清单一致，并对准确的模块或整机配置使用正确认证编号。
gap.zht: 面向中國設計的產品標籤通常缺少加拿大認證編號及必要的加拿大無線電聲明。進口商必須確認最終標籤、包裝、電子標籤和說明書與已認證的ISED清單一致，並對準確的模組或整機配置使用正確認證編號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ISED certification identification and related notices required for certified radio apparatus
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese SRRC and CCC markings required where applicable, but not equivalent to Canadian identification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Canadian IC/ISED number is a separate market-access marker. A missing, mismatched, or module-only number can block compliant Canadian sale even when the radio design has Chinese approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】加拿大IC/ISED编号是独立的市场准入标识。即使无线电设计已有中国批准，缺失、不匹配或仅适用于模块的编号仍可能阻碍在加拿大合规销售。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】加拿大IC/ISED編號是獨立的市場准入標示。即使無線電設計已有中國批准，缺失、不匹配或僅適用於模組的編號仍可能阻礙在加拿大合規銷售。

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
